description_long: This object is a classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) controller, featuring a rectangular body with a predominantly gray and black color scheme. The front face displays a black D-pad on the left, two red circular buttons labeled 'A' and 'B' on the right, and two small rectangular buttons in the center for 'Select' and 'Start'. The controller is connected to a black cable that extends from the top, indicating its wired nature. The surface is made of hard plastic with a smooth, slightly glossy finish, and the buttons are slightly raised for tactile feedback. The compact size and iconic design make it instantly recognizable as a retro gaming accessory.
description: A rectangular NES controller with a black D-pad, red A/B buttons, and a central cable, all set on a smooth gray and black plastic body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the D-pad, red A/B buttons, and central Select/Start buttons with the cable extending from the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the controller's slim profile and the protruding cable at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the controller and the cable extending outward, with the D-pad and buttons less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the controller's thickness and the arrangement of the buttons and D-pad from a different angle.
